findings.issue: Command argument logging may expose sensitive data in PR bodies or API payloads
findings.recommendation: Consider redacting known sensitive argument patterns before logging

findings.issue: Dry-run output exposes arguments that may contain secrets
findings.recommendation: Add warning that secrets may be displayed in dry-run mode

findings.issue: Token stored in environment variable - accessible via /proc on Linux
findings.recommendation: Document that token is passed via environment variable for transparency
